library(reshape2)
library(igraph)
library(ggrepel)
library(hdWGCNA)
pdf(file.path(out_dir, "Figure3A_hubgene_umap.pdf"), width = 15, height = 15)
options(future.globals.maxSize = 30 * 1024^3)
ModuleUMAPPlot(
  obj,
  edge.alpha = 0.5,
  sample_edges = TRUE,
  keep_grey_edges = FALSE,
  edge_prop = 0.075,
  #label_genes = label_genes,
  label_hubs = 5
)
dev.off()
